title: Skyblock Modernized
description: A Resource Pack that brings 1.9+ textures into a few Hypixel Skyblock items.
body:
---
**THIS PACK REQUIRES THE FIRMAMENT MOD TO WORK PROPERLY**

A Hypixel Skyblock resource pack that changes many of its items textures to modern, 1.9+ versions of them.

Use this as an overlay, since with very few exceptions it swaps textures around, it's **100%** compatible with _every other non hypixel skyblock_ Resource Pack (such as pvp packs for shortswords or higher resolution packs) and it won't look off.

---

Here's a list of every change:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Archaic Spade: Stone Shovel → Copper Shovel
- Aurora Staff: Blaze Rod → Breeze Rod
- Blade of the Volcano: Iron Sword → Copper Sword
- Chorus Fruit: Skull → Chorus Flower
- Decent Axe: Wooden Axe → Copper Axe
- Deep Sea Orb: Skull → Heart of the Sea
- Dungeon Chest Key: Tripwire Hook → Ominous Trial Key
- Ectoplasm: Prismarine Crystal → Phantom Membrane
- Fel Sword: Stone Sword → Netherite Sword
- Fire Freeze Staff: Dandelion → Golden Dandelion
- Flame Breaker Armor: Chainmail Armor → Netherite Armor
- Flaming Sword: Iron Sword → Copper Sword
- Florid Zombie Sword: Golden Sword → Copper Sword
- Glacite: Packed Ice → Blue Ice (changed blocks in the Glacite Tunnels too!)
- Glossy Gemstone: Purple Dye → Amethyst Crystal
- Hard Stone: Stone → Deepslate (changed blocks in the Crystal Hollows too!)
- Ice Spray Wand: Stick → Breeze Rod
- Implosion Scroll: Book and Quill → Flower Banner Pattern
- Jungle Key: Tripwire Hook → Trial Key
- Maxor Energy Crystal: Nether Star → End Crystal
- Moon Flower: Blue Orchid → Pitcher Plant
- Necron's Blades (Astraea, Hyperion, Scylla and Valkyrie): Iron Sword → Netherite Sword
- Ragnarock: Gold Sword → Mace
- Shadow Fury: Diamond Sword → Netherite Sword
- Shadow Warp Scroll: Book and Quill → Flow Banner Pattern
- Skeleton Key: Tripwire Hook → Ominous Trial Key
- Staff of the Volcano: Wheat → Brush
- Tormentor: Iron Sword → Netherite Sword
- Umber Key: Deadbush → Trial Key
- Wither Shield Scroll: Book and Quill → Skull Banner Pattern
- Tier 3 Farming Tools now turn into Netherite Hoes if they have 10 overclocks
- Various arrows changed to tipped arrows
- Crystal Hollows now has Deepslate instead of Stone
- Glacite Tunnels and Mineshafts now use Deepslate instead of Stone, Blue Ice instead of Packed Ice as well as various other changes to fit the replacement

</details>
